principle: one universe, many lanes; one canonical map, no orphan trees

next_actions.decision: Mantener AGENTS, Atlas, MIGRATION_MAP, DELETE_CANDIDATES y reportes como sistema nervioso del universo.
Borrar o ignorar solo caches/builds regenerables con reporte; no borrar fuentes unicas.
next_actions.gate: APPROVE if path-specific cache rule passes

next_actions.decision: No mover todo -=MEDIOEVO=- de golpe; extraer a root lanes solo piezas con ficha, hash y destino canonico.
Juego, TCG, sesiones, secretos y cuentas quedan bloqueados fuera de open/commercial.
Referenciar, archivar o excluir; no convertirlos en tecnologia principal salvo modulo minimo extraido.

rules: One universe does not mean flattening every folder into one directory.
A route is canon only when it has lane, purpose, gate, evidence and owner.
Untracked agent output is production residue until integrated into a lane.
Generated caches can be deleted by rule; unique sources move only with ficha and migration map.
Private, secret-like and external-action surfaces never become public canon by accident.
